name: Citrus Chicken
recipeIngredient: 4 x 125-150g chicken breast fillets, with skin on
150 ml fresh chicken stock, or made with cube
2 tsp freshly grated fresh root ginger
salt and freshly ground black pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the pickling onions in a bowl and cover with boiling water. Let sit for 2-3 minutes, then drain and peel the skins.
2. Heat oil in a large, flameproof casserole dish. Add onions and cook until golden brown. Add chicken breasts and brown on both sides. Reduce heat and simmer gently, uncovered, for 15 minutes.
3. Combine remaining ingredients (except thyme and cornflour) in a jug. Pour over the chicken. Add thyme, cover, and simmer for 15-20 minutes until chicken is cooked.
4. Remove chicken and onions to a serving dish. Mix cornflour with water and stir into cooking juices. Heat gently until thickened. Season as needed. Pour sauce over chicken and serve with boiled potatoes and green vegetable.
